redirecting_google: Redirecting to Google… if nothing happens, [click here]({url}).
check_email_confirm: Account created! Please check your email to confirm, then sign in.
magic_link_sent: Magic link sent! Check your email.
password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
no_watchlist_items: No watchlist items yet. Add tickers in the Watchlist page.
setup_description: Welcome to the **Portfolio Builder**! Set your total virtual investment amount to get started.
search_caption: Stocks · ETFs · Crypto · Forex · Indices · Bonds · Commodities
search_placeholder: e.g. Apple, AAPL, BTC-USD, SPY, Gold…
results_found: {n} result(s) — click a row to view details.
no_results: No results found. Try a different query.
stale_data_warning: ⚠ Showing last known data — live fetch failed.
chart_unavailable: Chart data unavailable for this instrument.
already_allocated: Already allocated {amount} in {ticker}. Submitting a new amount replaces the existing position.
fetch_price_failed: Could not fetch live price. Try again in a moment.
no_positions: No positions yet. Use the **Search & Add** tab to build your portfolio.
live_price_unavailable: ⚠ Live price unavailable for {tickers} — showing cost basis.
weighted_beta_help: Weighted average beta vs broad market
avg_30d_vol_help: Weighted avg of individual 30-day daily std dev
risk_mismatch_low: ⚠ **Risk mismatch**: Portfolio risk is **{score}/10** but your preference is **Low (≤4)**. Consider reducing volatile positions.
risk_mismatch_high: ℹ Portfolio risk is **{score}/10** but your preference is **High**. Consider adding growth or higher-beta assets.
risk_aligned: ✅ Portfolio risk ({score}/10) is aligned with your **{level}** preference.
sector_concentration_warning: ⚠ **{sector}** makes up {weight:.1f}% of your portfolio — consider diversifying.
build_portfolio_first: Build your portfolio first, then come back for personalised AI suggestions.
click_refresh: Click **Refresh Suggestions** to generate AI recommendations.
arbitrage_caption: Real-time pricing gaps between TASE and NYSE for dual-listed companies.
no_arb_gaps: No arbitrage gaps detected right now. Check back during market hours.
top_opportunities_desc: Here are the biggest pricing differences between the Tel Aviv and New York stock exchanges:
tase_premium_desc: **{name}** is **{pct:.2f}% more expensive on TASE** than on NYSE right now. Buying on NYSE and selling on TASE could theoretically lock in this difference.
foreign_premium_desc: **{name}** is **{pct:.2f}% cheaper on TASE** than on NYSE. It may be worth buying locally.
parity_desc: **{name}** prices are roughly equal on both exchanges ({pct:.2f}% gap).
watchlist_caption: Track your favourite stocks. Add TASE tickers (e.g. TEVA.TA) or NYSE tickers.
watchlist_empty: Your watchlist is empty. Add a ticker above to start tracking.
whatsapp_help: Receive arbitrage and volatility alerts via WhatsApp
morning_help: Daily AI-powered market summary sent to your WhatsApp
could_not_load_profile: Could not load profile. Please try refreshing.
reset_email_desc: We'll send a password reset link to **{email}**.
reset_sent: Reset email sent! Check your inbox.
danger_warning: The following actions cannot be undone.
onboarding_subtitle: Let's set up your account in 3 quick steps.
beginner_card_desc:
- Simple metrics and plain language
- Virtual trading with ₪100,000 sandbox
- Daily market summary delivered to WhatsApp
pro_card_desc:
- Full candlestick charts with RSI & MACD
- Complete arbitrage scanner
- Custom watchlist & risk heatmap
step2_beginner_desc: We'll create a virtual trading account with **₪100,000** for you to practice buying and selling Israeli stocks — no real money involved.
step2_pro_desc: Enter comma-separated tickers to track (e.g. `TEVA.TA, LUMI.TA, CHKP.TA`). You can always add or remove tickers later.
please_enter_one_ticker: Please enter at least one ticker.
step3_desc: Receive a personalised morning market summary every weekday at 08:45 IST. You can always change this in your Profile settings.
all_set: All set! Redirecting to your dashboard…
home_desc: Israeli market intelligence platform — USD/ILS rates, TASE stocks, arbitrage detection, and AI-powered summaries.
home_hint: 👈 Use the sidebar to navigate to Dashboard, Paper Trading, Arbitrage Scanner, and more.
